title: APSO TumCase
description: APSO TumCase is a mod of many things mobs, swords, tools.
body:
APSO TUMCASE Where the ultra mod manifests itself and many things can happen, explore worlds, biomes and become as strong as possible so you can rest and appreciate what you have done.

 
❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

📌 Can I use the mod in my modpack?

✔️ Yes, you can! 👍


📌 Do I need other mods for it to work?

Version V0.85-: Yes, these mods are required:

 Curios API

 GeckoLib

 PlayerAnimation

Version 1.20+:APSO Core is required.


📌 Is the mod complete?

It is not 100% complete, it is still under development and may contain some bugs.

Mod Creator Channel: [DoutorAxolot27](https://www.youtube.com/@DoutorAxolot27)   

  
APSOStudios
